task_completion.description: Enter the Organization Name and Industry in the creation form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Vtiger CRM 'Creating New Organization' form where the 'Organization Name' field contains 'Redwood Consulting Partners' and the 'Industry' dropdown is set to 'Consulting'.

task_completion.description: Enter the Phone and Website details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Phone' field containing '650-555-2100' and the 'Website' field containing 'https://www.redwoodcp.com' in the organization creation form.

task_completion.description: Enter the complete Billing Address details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Billing Address section with '2800 Sand Hill Road' in the Street field, 'Menlo Park' in City, 'CA' in State, '94025' in Postal Code, and 'United States' in Country.

task_completion.description: Enter the Annual Revenue and Employees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Annual Revenue' field containing '18,000,000' (or '$18,000,000') and the 'Employees' field containing '95'.

Look for the 'Description' text area containing 'Management consulting firm specializing in digital transformation for mid-market companies. Key verticals: healthcare, financial services, and manufacturing.'

task_completion.description: Save the organization and view the created record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the final organization details view (read-only mode) showing 'Redwood Consulting Partners' as the title, confirming the record was successfully saved in Vtiger CRM.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Vtiger CRM web interface rather than using terminal commands or direct database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Vtiger CRM UI, clicking buttons, and typing into form fields, with no terminal windows executing SQL or curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Vtiger CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be Vtiger CRM running in a browser, not a text editor, a mock HTML page, or a generic form.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to manipulate the DOM or inject success states.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer console/inspector should not be open or used to bypass the standard form submission process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Organization Name: 'Redwood Consulting Partners'. Industry: 'Consulting'. Phone: '650-555-2100'. City: 'Menlo Park'. State: 'CA'.
